summary: Comprehensive backend (pytest, 27 tests) + frontend (Playwright UI) testing of AAYNA Milestone 1 storefront. ALL critical flows pass: settings, categories, products (no cost_price/internal_notes leak), search/filter/sort, cart/validate, BD phone validation, checkout (Dhaka=80, outside=130), idempotency via client_request_id, stock reduction, out-of-stock guard, order confirmation (no phone/address leak), track by order# and phone, static pages. UI: homepage hero+6 categories+grids+WhatsApp float, shop 10 products with filter+sort, PDP qty/add-to-cart, cart, full Dhaka COD checkout creating ORD-1004 with refresh idempotency, bKash transaction-id reveal, validation blocks for invalid phone & empty form, /track-order works for phone+order id+invalid.

issues: Phone shows literal placeholder '+8801XXXXXXXXX' (expected per spec since WhatsApp number is placeholder, but visually rough for end users — main agent may want a softer placeholder like 'Coming soon')
1 console 404 detected on track-order page (likely a missing image asset); non-blocking but worth investigating

action_items: Optional: replace literal '+8801XXXXXXXXX' footer placeholder with a friendlier 'Coming soon' or hide until configured.
Optional: investigate the single 404 console request on /track-order (likely a missing image).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 596 lines — close to the 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting into routers (products, checkout, track, settings) before the file grows in Milestone 2.
checkout endpoint accepts customer_email without format validation; consider EmailStr (Pydantic) for type safety.
No rate limiting on /api/checkout or /api/track — abuse risk; consider slowapi or middleware later.

Idempotency relies solely on client_request_id; if frontend omits it, double-submit would create two orders. Frontend always sends one (verified), but backend could enforce by also de-duping on (phone, items hash, last 60s).
BD_DISTRICTS membership check is case-sensitive — small typo from frontend would reject. Frontend already uses canonical names so OK.
Good: cost_price, internal_notes, _id are properly excluded; confirmation endpoint does NOT leak phone/address; track endpoint does NOT leak admin notes/phone.
test_credentials: None required (Milestone 1 has no auth). Sample phone 01712345678 used.
seed_data_creation: Several TEST_ prefixed orders were created during checkout testing (ORD-1002, ORD-1003, ORD-1004). Stock for first products was decremented by 1 each. Notification_logs entries marked 'failed' because MAKE_WEBHOOK_URL=placeholder — order creation still succeeded as required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression test at /app/backend/tests/test_aayna_storefront.py covers all 12 endpoint requirements. Track UI route is /track-order (NOT /track). District field is a Radix Select (button[role=combobox]) — use click+role=option pattern, NOT select_option. Order counter started at ORD-1001 from prior manual curl, my tests bumped it to ORD-1004+. Webhook is intentionally placeholder — orders save with notification_logs.status='failed'.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Idempotency on refresh was verified end-to-end: same order_number returned on POST with same client_request_id, and OrderConfirmation page refresh just GETs /api/orders/{order_number}.
